title: Voxel Shape
description: A behavior pack file that defines the voxel shape used for collision and culling of a custom block. Voxel shapes use pixel coordinates (1 block = 16 pixels) and can be referenced by the block geometry component's 'culling' property.

minecraft:voxel_shape.title: Voxel Shape
minecraft:voxel_shape.description: The voxel shape definition, containing a description and shape data.

description.title: Description
description.description: Contains the identifier used to refer to this voxel shape.

identifier.description: Sets the identifier for this voxel shape. Used to reference this shape in the 'culling' property of the block geometry component.
identifier.title: Identifier

shape.title: Shape
shape.description: The shape data for this voxel shape, consisting of one or more axis-aligned bounding boxes.

boxes.title: Boxes
boxes.description: A list of axis-aligned bounding boxes (AABBs) that make up the voxel shape. Each box is defined by a min and max position in pixel coordinates (1 block = 16 pixels). Maximum of 32 boxes. Each box must overlap with the main 16x16x16 block region by at least 1 pixel.

items.title: Box
items.description: An axis-aligned bounding box defined by its min and max corners in pixel coordinates.

min.title: Min
min.description: The minimum (lower) corner of the bounding box in pixel coordinates [x, y, z]. Values must be in the range -30 to 30.

max.title: Max
max.description: The maximum (upper) corner of the bounding box in pixel coordinates [x, y, z]. Values must be in the range -30 to 30 and must be greater than the corresponding min values.

A.title: Format Version
A.description: A version that tells minecraft what type of data format can be expected when reading this file.
